brainstorming.template: Load and follow the brainstorming superpowers skill. Explore user intent, requirements, and design before writing any code.
brainstorming.description: Explore user intent, requirements, and design before implementation

test-driven-development.template: Load and follow the test-driven-development superpowers skill. Enforce RED-GREEN-REFACTOR: write failing test, watch it fail, write minimal code, watch it pass, refactor, commit.
test-driven-development.description: RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle for implementing features or bugfixes

systematic-debugging.template: Load and follow the systematic-debugging superpowers skill. Debug the issue using the 4-phase root cause process before proposing fixes.
systematic-debugging.description: 4-phase root cause debugging process for bugs and test failures

writing-plans.template: Load and follow the writing-plans superpowers skill. Break the spec into bite-sized tasks with exact file paths, complete code, and verification steps.
writing-plans.description: Create detailed implementation plans from specs or requirements

subagent-driven-development.template: Load and follow the subagent-driven-development superpowers skill. Dispatch independent tasks to subagents with two-stage review: spec compliance then code quality.
subagent-driven-development.description: Fast iteration with two-stage subagent review

executing-plans.template: Load and follow the executing-plans superpowers skill. Execute the implementation plan with review checkpoints.
executing-plans.description: Execute a written implementation plan in a separate session with review checkpoints

dispatching-parallel-agents.template: Load and follow the dispatching-parallel-agents superpowers skill. Break the work into independent tasks and dispatch each to a separate subagent.
dispatching-parallel-agents.description: Dispatch 2+ independent tasks to parallel subagents

requesting-code-review.template: Load and follow the requesting-code-review superpowers skill. Review the current work against requirements and report issues by severity.
requesting-code-review.description: Verify work meets requirements before merging

receiving-code-review.template: Load and follow the receiving-code-review superpowers skill. Process the code review feedback with technical rigor, verify claims, and implement appropriately.
receiving-code-review.description: Process code review feedback with technical rigor and verification

using-git-worktrees.template: Load and follow the using-git-worktrees superpowers skill. Create an isolated workspace on a new branch and verify a clean test baseline.
using-git-worktrees.description: Create isolated workspace for feature work

verification-before-completion.template: Load and follow the verification-before-completion superpowers skill. Run verification commands and confirm output before declaring success.
verification-before-completion.description: Verify work is complete before committing or creating PRs

finishing-a-development-branch.template: Load and follow the finishing-a-development-branch superpowers skill. Present structured options for merge, PR, or discard of the current branch.
finishing-a-development-branch.description: Guide completion of development work with merge/PR/cleanup options

writing-skills.template: Load and follow the writing-skills superpowers skill. Create or modify skills following best practices and testing methodology.
writing-skills.description: Create, edit, or verify superpowers skills
